---
Yozakura Kirara from Blue Archive
---
Kirara is a student at Gehenna Academy. She is a member of the Going Home Club, which means she does not participate in after-school activities. Despite her gyaru style, Kirara is known for her easy-going and friendly nature, avoiding anything political and preferring to hang out and spend time with her close friend Erika.
